column1: # WHO Global Health Observatory (GHO) OData API indicator catalog
# This file is the single source of truth for which WHO GHO API
# indicators are read in Stage 2. Every Stage 2 WHO GHO API adapter
# call resolves its raw_column + dim1_filter from this file.
# Adding/removing an indicator here is the only change needed to
# widen or narrow the WHO GHO API ingestion.
# Source: WHO Global Health Observatory
#   https://ghoapi.azureedge.net/api/
# License: open; cite WHO (see docs/sources/attributions.md).
# Citation: see docs/sources/attributions.md (verbatim from the WHO GHO
#   OData API documentation).
# Columns in this catalog (extended schema for the GHO API):
#   - variable_name      : canonical Stage 2 / score-module name
#   - raw_column         : WHO GHO API IndicatorCode (e.g. WHOSIS_000001)
#   - rating_category     : one of the 8 rating categories from §4
#   - raw_scale          : how the API emits the value
#                          (years
#   - normalized_scale_target : the scale the score modules normalize to
#                              (always 0-10 for the prototype)
#   - higher_is_better   : 1 = higher raw value = better (e.g. life
#                          expectancy)
#                          mortality)
#   - unit               : the unit string surfaced to users
#   - dim1_filter        : the OData Dim1 filter to apply (or empty if
#                          the indicator has no SEX disaggregation).
#                          The default for SEX-disaggregated
#                          indicators is "SEX_BTSX" (both-sexes
#                          aggregate) so the Stage 2 frame is one
#                          row per (country
#                          multiplier is required downstream.
#   - description        : human-readable description for the
#                          Stage 15 summary report
# Indicator coverage:
#   - All 5 indicators are in the social_wellbeing category.
#   - The catalog picks the both-sexes aggregate for SEX-disaggregated
#     indicators so the Stage 2 frame is one row per (country
#     Indicators that have no SEX disaggregation (the 3 WHS4_100/117/543
#     immunization indicators) leave dim1_filter empty.
# Sentinel handling:
#   - WHO GHO API represents missing numeric values as NumericValue=null
#     in the JSON response. The reader converts null/None to None in
#     the Stage 2 frame and to NaN in the wide format.
#   - SpatialDimType other than COUNTRY (REGION
#     GLOBAL) is filtered out at the read step (we want per-country
#     observations only).
#   - Some records have empty SpatialDim or non-3-letter codes
#     (defensive filter).
# Year coverage:
#   - The WHO GHO API is updated on a per-indicator basis; the latest
#     data year varies. For the prototype's target year 2023
#     indicators still have 2021 as the latest year. The orchestrator
#     passes the caller-requested year through; if no records exist
#     for that year the result is an empty Stage 2 frame (no
#     observations
column2: no error). The caller can request an earlier

column1: #     year explicitly if a proxy is desired.
#   - This is the standard behavior for an API-backed source -- no
#     silent overwrites
#     proxies. The Stage 11 confidence engine penalises
#     `not_available` cells.
# When extending this file:
#   1. Verify the indicator code via
#      ``curl -s https://ghoapi.azureedge.net/api/Indicator?$filter=...``
#   2. If the indicator is SEX-disaggregated
#      ``dim1_filter=SEX_BTSX`` (or a more specific Dim1 value if
#      needed). If it has no SEX dimension
#      empty.
#   3. Pick a ``variable_name`` of the form ``who_gho_<short>`` that
#      does not collide with the existing entries.
#   4. Set ``rating_category`` to one of the 8 (see
#      docs/sources/vetting/report.md §11).
#   5. Set ``higher_is_better`` correctly (life expectancy =
#      higher is better; under-5 mortality = lower is better).
#   6. Add a fixture cache file at
#      ``tests/fixtures/who_gho_api/cache/<year>/<raw_column>.json``
#      and update the test_ingest_who_gho_api.py row-count assertion.
variable_name
who_gho_life_expectancy
column10: years); WHO GHO headline social-wellbeing metric

column10: probability of dying by age 5 per 1000 live births)

column9: DTP3 immunization coverage among 1-year-olds (%); no SEX disaggregation
